description: Blender is an open-source 3D creation suite for modeling, animation, rendering, compositing, video editing, and related workflows. The blender.org site also publishes project resources and documentation for Blender-related tools, including an official MCP server project.
summary: blender.org publicly documents one MCP integration surface: the Blender MCP Server for local Blender sessions, with no service-issued credential documented.
